soil.notes: Mulch helps keep fruit clean and reduces rot; avoid waterlogging.

transplant_out.notes: Plant crowns at soil level; avoid burying the crown.

harvest.notes: Main harvest depends on variety (June-bearing vs everbearing).

nutrition.notes: Avoid heavy nitrogen during flowering; potassium supports fruiting.

pruning.notes: Remove runners if you want more fruit; remove old leaves after harvest if needed. Mulch to reduce rot.

pollination.aid_notes: Pollinators improve fruit shape; encourage insects nearby.

good.reason: Alliums can help deter some pests; practical border companion.
Can be used as a short-term filler between young plants.

avoid.reason: Different pest complexes and bed management; not ideal in tight mixed plantings.
